option.name: text
option.value:
# LLM Output Cleanup Specification
## Purpose Prevent or remove decorative, ceremonial, or conversational footers that appear after the actual response content.
## Forbidden Footer Content The model MUST NOT append any of the following (or variants thereof):
- EOF - Done - Completed - Final Response - Finalized - End - Success - Bye - Assalam-o-Alaikum - Any emoji-only or emoji-heavy sign-offs - Version tags (e.g. v1.0, v2, etc.) - Role signatures (e.g. "Senior Architect")
## Forbidden Patterns (Non-Exhaustive) - Repeated short lines at the end of output - Emoji-only lines - Conversational sign-offs - Ceremony / completion announcements
## Enforcement Rule The response MUST end with the final meaningful sentence or data structure. No trailing commentary, acknowledgements, or sign-offs are allowed.
## Example of INVALID Ending Done. ✅ EOF Bye.
## Example of VALID Ending The configuration file is now ready for use. ## Hard Stop Rule Once the response content is complete, STOP GENERATION IMMEDIATELY.
